intended_use: The Overjet Caries Assist (OCA) is a radiological, automated, concurrent read, computer-assisted detection software intended to aid in the detection and segmentation of caries on bitewing radiographs.
intended_use_full: The Overjet Caries Assist (OCA) is a radiological, automated, concurrent read, computer-assisted detection software intended to aid in the detection and segmentation of caries on bitewing radiographs. The device provides additional information for the dentist to use in their diagnosis of a tooth surface suspected of being carious. The device is not intended as a replacement for a complete dentist's review or their clinical judgment that takes into account other relevant information from the image, patient history, and actual in vivo clinical assessment.
ground_truth: Consensus labels of three US licensed dentists with non-consensus labels adjudicated by a Dental Radiologist
other_metrics: Standalone sensitivity for primary caries: 74.4% (64.4%, 84.4%); for secondary caries: 62.5% (46.6%, 78.4%). Reader sensitivity improved from 57.9% (48.9%, 66.0%) unassisted to 76.2% (68.4%, 82.6%) assisted. Reader specificity decreased from 99.3% (99.1%, 99.5%) unassisted to 98.4% (94.5%, 98.8%) assisted. Dice coefficient for primary caries: 0.69 (0.66, 0.72) SD 0.122; for secondary caries: 0.75 (0.71, 0.79) SD 0.112. AFROC AUC increase of 0.057 (0.039, 0.098), p<0.001.
